sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19925" key="biblopw/lhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βιβλοπώλης</orth>, <sense id="n19925.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βιβλιο-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:52B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52B.</biblScope> </bibl> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βίβλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βύβλος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
